'''鈭歡-l-ng-j''' ('''kagalngejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vapour|vapour]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-l-ng-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vapour|vapour]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-l-ng-j
|-
! Lemma
| kagalngejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigalngejoko|thigalngejoko]] || [[word:jigalngejoko|jigalngejoko]] || [[word:shigalngejoko|shigalngejoko]] || [[word:kigalngejoko|kigalngejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugalngejoko|thuthugalngejoko]] || [[word:jujugalngejoko|jujugalngejoko]] || [[word:shushugalngejoko|shushugalngejoko]] || [[word:kukugalngejoko|kukugalngejoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
